verses.text: 'The LORD reigneth; let the people tremble,' enthroned between the cherubim, great in Zion; let them praise His name, 'for it is holy.' His majesty calls for awe. The reigning God is holy, and His holiness is the heart of His praise.

'The LORD reigneth; let the people tremble,' enthroned between the cherubim, great in Zion; let them praise His name, 'for it is holy.' His majesty calls for awe. The reigning God is holy, and His holiness is the heart of His praise.

'The LORD reigneth; let the people tremble,' enthroned between the cherubim, great in Zion; let them praise His name, 'for it is holy.' His majesty calls for awe. The reigning God is holy, and His holiness is the heart of His praise.

The King's strength loves justice and equity; let men exalt Him and worship at His footstool, 'for he is holy.' Power and righteousness meet in Him. The mighty God uses His strength to do what is right.

The King's strength loves justice and equity; let men exalt Him and worship at His footstool, 'for he is holy.' Power and righteousness meet in Him. The mighty God uses His strength to do what is right.
Moses, Aaron, and Samuel called on the LORD, and He answered them out of the cloudy pillar. He hears His servants. The God of holiness is also the God who responds to earnest prayer.
Moses, Aaron, and Samuel called on the LORD, and He answered them out of the cloudy pillar. He hears His servants. The God of holiness is also the God who responds to earnest prayer.

God answered them, a forgiving God who also took vengeance on their deeds; let men worship at His holy hill, 'for the LORD our God is holy.' Mercy and justice meet. The thrice-repeated 'holy' marks the keynote of His character.

God answered them, a forgiving God who also took vengeance on their deeds; let men worship at His holy hill, 'for the LORD our God is holy.' Mercy and justice meet. The thrice-repeated 'holy' marks the keynote of His character.
